# Fund Creation Lifecycle

> CFA-driven fund setup from mandate through IPS, benchmark, Reg 28 flag, custodian registration, seed capital, and go-live

**Category:** Workflow · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** fund-setup · mandate · ips · benchmark · custodian · lifecycle · cfa

## What this does

CFA-driven fund setup from mandate through IPS, benchmark, Reg 28 flag, custodian registration, seed capital, and go-live

Combines technical outcomes (acceptance criteria) with documented business flows, so engineering and operations share one source of truth.

## Fields

- **fund_id** *(text, required)* — Fund Identifier
- **fund_name** *(text, required)* — Fund Name
- **mandate** *(rich_text, required)* — Investment Mandate
- **ips_document** *(file, optional)* — IPS Document
- **benchmark** *(text, required)* — Benchmark Index
- **reg28_flag** *(boolean, required)* — Regulation 28 Fund
- **custodian_id** *(text, optional)* — Custodian Identifier
- **seed_capital** *(number, optional)* — Seed Capital (ZAR)
- **status** *(select, required)* — Fund Status

## What must be true

- **mandate_definition:** MUST: Mandate captures investment universe, benchmark, return target, risk limits, liquidity, and exclusions
- **mandate_definition → required_sections:** universe, benchmark, return_target, risk_limits, liquidity, exclusions
- **ips_content:** MUST: IPS documents goals, constraints, time horizon, rebalancing policy, reporting cadence. Approved by compliance before next stage.
- **ips_content → approver:** compliance_officer
- **reg28:** MUST: If reg28_flag is true, apply Regulation 28 limits from day one; verify at each lifecycle step
- **custodian:** MUST: Custodian registration requires signed agreement, account numbers, SWIFT details, and reconciliation contact
- **seed_capital:** MUST: Fund cannot go live without verified seed capital in the custodian account
- **seed_capital → minimum_zar:** 1000000
- **separation_of_duties:** MUST: CFA defines mandate; compliance approves IPS; fund admin handles custodian; no single actor covers all stages

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Fund Created Successfully** — when fund_name exists; mandate exists, then Fund record created in draft state. _Why: A new fund was initialized in draft state with a defined mandate._
- **Mandate Approved** — when mandate contains universe, benchmark, return target, risk limits, then Mandate finalized. _Why: Mandate meets required sections and is approved._
- **Ips Approved** — when compliance_officer has signed off IPS, then IPS accepted. _Why: IPS reviewed and approved by compliance._
- **Fund Launched** — when seed capital has been verified in the custodian account; compliance sign-off recorded, then Fund is live. _Why: Fund is live and accepting allocations._

**❌ Failure paths**

- **Mandate Rejected** — when any required mandate section is missing, then Mandate returned to CFA for revision. _Why: Mandate missing required sections or violates internal policy._ *(error: `FUND_MANDATE_REJECTED`)*
- **Custodian Rejection** — when custodian returned a registration rejection, then Registration blocked pending remediation. _Why: Custodian declined to register the fund._ *(error: `FUND_CUSTODIAN_REJECTED`)*

## Business flows

**Happy Path**

## Errors it can return

- `FUND_MANDATE_REJECTED` — Fund mandate is incomplete or violates policy.
- `FUND_CUSTODIAN_REJECTED` — Custodian registration was rejected.
- `FUND_NOT_FOUND` — Fund not found.

## Events

**`fund.created`** — Fund initialized in draft
  Payload: `fund_id`, `fund_name`

**`fund.mandate_approved`** — Mandate finalized
  Payload: `fund_id`

**`fund.ips_approved`** — IPS approved by compliance
  Payload: `fund_id`

**`fund.launched`** — Fund live
  Payload: `fund_id`, `seed_capital`

**`fund.mandate_rejected`** — Mandate missing required sections
  Payload: `fund_id`, `missing_sections`

**`fund.custodian_rejected`** — Custodian registration rejected
  Payload: `fund_id`, `custodian_id`, `reason_code`

## Connects to

- **regulation-28-compliance** *(required)* — Reg 28 funds must satisfy prudential limits from day one
- **client-risk-profiling-ips** *(recommended)* — Client IPS informs fund mandate
- **fund-custodian-reconciliation** *(required)* — Custodian recon starts once the fund is registered
- **immutable-audit-log** *(required)* — All lifecycle transitions must be audited
